author: Charlie Munger
quote: The first rule of compounding: Never interrupt it unnecessarily.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: Spend each day trying to be a little wiser than you were when you woke up.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: The big money is not in the buying or the selling, but in the waiting.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: It is remarkable how much long-term advantage people have gotten by trying to be consistently not stupid instead of trying to be very intelligent.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: Knowing what you don’t know is more useful than being brilliant.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: Avoiding stupidity is easier than seeking brilliance.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: The iron rule of nature is: you get what you reward.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: Invert, always invert.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: All I want to know is where I’m going to die, so I’ll never go there.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: A great business at a fair price is superior to a fair business at a great price.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: The best thing a human being can do is to help another human being know more.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: The safest way to try to get what you want is to try to deserve what you want.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: You don’t have to be brilliant, only a little bit wiser than the other guys, on average, for a long time.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: Mimicking the herd invites regression to the mean.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: Those who keep learning will keep rising.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: If you don’t get elementary probability into your repertoire, you go through a long life like a one-legged man in an ass-kicking contest.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: Opportunity comes to the prepared mind.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: It’s not supposed to be easy. Anyone who finds it easy is stupid.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: Take a simple idea and take it seriously.

author: Charlie Munger
quote: The world is not driven by greed; it’s driven by envy.

author: Elon Musk
quote: When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favor.

author: Elon Musk
quote: Persistence is very important. You should not give up unless you are forced to give up.

author: Elon Musk
quote: Constantly think about how you could be doing things better and questioning yourself.

author: Elon Musk
quote: Some people don’t like change, but you need to embrace change if the alternative is disaster.

author: Elon Musk
quote: Great companies are built on great products.

author: Elon Musk
quote: Failure is an option here. If things are not failing, you are not innovating enough.

author: Elon Musk
quote: You should take the approach that you’re wrong. Your goal is to be less wrong.

author: Elon Musk
quote: The first step is to establish that something is possible; then probability will occur.

author: Elon Musk
quote: If you get up in the morning and think the future is going to be better, it is a bright day.

author: Elon Musk
quote: Brand is just a perception, and perception will match reality over time.

author: Elon Musk
quote: I think it is possible for ordinary people to choose to be extraordinary.

author: Elon Musk
quote: Patience is a virtue, and I’m learning patience. It’s a tough lesson.

author: Elon Musk
quote: If something is important enough, even if the probability is low, you should still do it.

author: Elon Musk
quote: It’s OK to have your eggs in one basket as long as you control what happens to that basket.

author: Elon Musk
quote: The path to the CEO’s office should not be through the CFO’s office.

author: Elon Musk
quote: Physics is a good framework for thinking.

author: Elon Musk
quote: I think it’s very important to have a feedback loop.

author: Elon Musk
quote: If you’re trying to create a company, it’s like baking a cake.

author: Elon Musk
quote: Being an entrepreneur is like eating glass and staring into the abyss.

author: Elon Musk
quote: The future is vastly more exciting and interesting if we’re a spacefaring civilization.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Stay hungry. Stay foolish.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: You can’t connect the dots looking forward; you can only connect them looking backward.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Real artists ship.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Your time is limited, so don’t waste it living someone else’s life.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Quality is more important than quantity.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Focus is about saying no.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: I’m convinced that about half of what separates successful entrepreneurs from the non-successful ones is pure perseverance.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: The people who are crazy enough to think they can change the world are the ones who do.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Sometimes life hits you in the head with a brick. Don’t lose faith.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: That’s been one of my mantras — focus and simplicity.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: We’re here to put a dent in the universe.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Being the richest man in the cemetery doesn’t matter to me.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Technology alone is not enough.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: Deciding what not to do is as important as deciding what to do.
